statement: A vaccination certificate should be impossible to be requested by organizers of events upon entry.
Less money should be spent on defense by the Netherlands.
All parents should be paying for child care at least three days a week.
The European Union (EU) must be remained in by the Netherlands.
Instead of the tax on car ownership, a tax per kilometer driven for motorists should not be introduced.
During the upcoming New Year's Eve, decorative fireworks should remain illegal to be set off again.
Less tax should be imposed on buying meat.
Public broadcasting must be given more money.
Instead of the existing health insurance companies, a national healthcare fund for everyone should not be established.
The ban on face-covering clothing should be kept by the government.
Where new housing developments are built should be decided by provinces and municipalities, rather than the national government.
The VAT on cultural activities should be kept by the government.
A new nuclear power plant should be scrapped by the Netherlands.
The less tax benefits should be received by households with two partners, one of whom works, as by households with two working partners.
The historical slave trade should not be apologized for by the Dutch government.
Laws passed by parliament should not be stopped by a citizens' referendum.
As much as elementary school teachers earn should be earned by high school teachers.
Fewer flight taxes for short-haul flights should be introduced by the Netherlands.
A rental home should be allowed to be obtained by asylum seekers with a temporary residence permit before they are integrated.
The government should make both the purchase and sale of soft drugs by coffee shops illegal.
Education in Dutch should be made less compulsory at universities and colleges by the government.
Assistance with suicide should be denied to be received by people who consider their lives complete.
An increase in welfare benefits should automatically be the result of an increase in minimum wages.
New restrictions on farm activities should be imposed.
Relative authorities should not establish a middle school, because students are now old enough when they have the choice between vmbo, havo or vwo.
Fewer refugees should be accepted by the Netherlands than it does now.
Measures should be taken by the state to increase the gap between rich and poor.
Spending on public health care should be decreased by the government, so as not to increase taxes.
Relative authorities should increase working hours without increasing workers' salaries.
The economy should be intervened by governments as much as possible.
The government should reduce taxes on fossil fuels and ignore the Green Transition.
Irrigated agricultural areas should be reduced by the future Spanish government through large water transfers.
Sovereignty must be ceded by us to better defend Spain's interests in Europe.
The weakening of NATO in Europe should be promoted by the Spanish government.
The worst way to solve the conflict in Catalonia is for its citizens' future to be allowed to be voted on by themselves in a referendum.
The State is strengthened by negotiating with the independentistas.
Relative authorities must deepen the centralization of power in Spain.
The Constitution must ignore the right of self-determination.
Spanish is protected by the policies of linguistic immersion in the own language of bilingual Autonomous Communities.
The Law of Democratic Memory passed during this legislature be passed is necessary.
Immigrants' health services should be received for free by themselves.
The free market should be allowed to determine housing prices to ensure access for all people.
All highways are to have unlimited speed allowed on them.
German's defense spending is to be reduced by themselves.
The government should allow only adults (18 and over) to vote in federal elections.
The government is to expand the promotion of wind energy.
No law is to limit the ability of landlords to increase housing rents.
Patents are to end to protect Covid-19 vaccines.
The government should reverse the phase-out of coal-fired power generation planned for 2038.
The government is to require all workers to be optionally insured in the statutory pension scheme.
Relative authorities are to extend the right of recognized refugees to family reunification.
The government is to levy no taxes on revenue generated in Germany from digital services.
The government is to promote other cohabiting couples more than the traditional family of father, mother and children.
Relative authorities should prohibit donations from companies to political parties.
BAföG should be received by students depending on their parents' income.
Different gender identities should not be used in gender-neutral language by federal authorities in their publications.
The government should not allow the Nord Stream 2 Baltic Sea pipeline, which transports gas from Russia to Germany, to go into operation as planned.
The government should remain in place the solidarity surcharge completely.
Headscarves are to be banned from being worn by female civil servants while on duty.
Less financial support is to be provided by the federal government for projects to combat anti-Semitism.
Contracts for the expansion of the communications infrastructure in Germany should be allowed to be received by Chinese companies.
Church tax for religious communities should be stopped from being collected by the state.
The government is to prohibit the controlled sale of cannabis.
The European Union should be remained a member by Germany.
The parties are to fill their state lists for the elections to the German Bundestag without considering an equal distribution of men and women.
Hospitals are to continue to bill inpatient treatment individually.
The government should discontinue to levy a tax on high assets again.
The government should prohibit the use of facial recognition software for video surveillance in public places.
Preferential tax treatment should continue to be received by married couples with children.
The government should promote conventional agriculture more than organic farming.
The state is to be able to reject Islamic associations as religious communities.
The price set by the state for CO2 emissions from heating and driving is to increase less than planned.
The parliament is to lift the debt brake in the Basic Law.
The government is to grant asylum to more people than just those who are politically persecuted.
The government is to reduce the statutory minimum wage by 2022 at the latest.
The government is to tax air traffic at a lower rate.
Whether to allow their employees to work from home is to be allowed everywhere, regardless of the company, if possible.
Polish domestic policy should be more influenced by the European Union.
The government should reduce social transfers so as not to increase the burden on the state budget in times of inflation.
Private visits to specialists should not be financed by the state, regardless of the waiting time in a public facility.
A free nursery place should be refrained from being provided by the state for all children.
Less freedom should be given to schools to choose the content covered in the curriculum.
Low-income rental housing should be refrained from being built by the state.
The government should lower taxes for top earners.
The government should make early retirement based on the number of years worked, regardless of age, impossible.
The parliament should tighten abortion laws.
Health premiums should be paid by entrepreneurs based on their income.
The migrant relocation solutions adopted by the European Union should be rejected by Poland.
The government should further reduce the share of defense spending in Poland's GDP.
Grain imports from Ukraine should be supported by Poland.
The government should increase public media funding from the state budget.
Relative authorities should increase the powers of the secret services to track citizens' activities on the Internet.
Hungary's sovereignty is protected by the EU's rule of law mechanism.
Only foreign economic interests should take into account Hungarian foreign policy.
Whether to remain part of the EU should be decided by Hungary without consulting the electorate.
Environmental influences (e.g. media content, sensitising activities) is not relevant to gender identity.
The state need to implement weaker regulation of the work of foreign-funded NGOs.
The European Public Prosecutor's Office should be withdrawn from by Hungary.
More effective law enforcement does not need the disclosure of the origin of criminals.
The government should remain the age of compulsory schooling at 16.
Changing the university model (reorganisation into a trust) has increased political influence.
The government should only allow same-sex couples to marry.
The proportion of men and women on the lists should be prevented from converging by political parties.
Targeted measures should be taken by the state to prevent fathers and mothers from sharing equally in child-rearing.
The Istanbul Convention, which combats violence against women and domestic violence should be rejected by the Hungarian government.
The government does not need to implement comprehensive public procurement reform (e.g. opening up large-scale centralised public procurement to smaller companies).
People are barred by public employment from re-entering the labour market.
The government should not cut the current three-month unemployment benefit.
It is wrong that the school-entry maturity of children from the age of six is decided by the Education Office, rather than by parents and nursery teachers.
Hungary should make the use of medical cannabis illegal.
The government should not establish an independent Ministry of Health.
The Parliament should elect the President of the Hungarian Republic.
The government needs to implement comprehensive reform of the electoral system (redrawing of district boundaries, abolition of winner's compensation, extension of postal voting).
The government should provide a civilian regulatory framework for primaries.
The government should avoid higher taxes on polluting companies.
In larger cities, the government should not restrict car traffic by various measures (P+R parking, building cycle paths, improving public transport).
A broad social dialogue is unjustified by the redevelopment of urban green areas (e.g. the Liget project in Budapest).
It is unnecessary that the government needs to establish an independent ministry for the environment.
The government should not introduce an animal rights commissioner.
The Eurozone should be continued by Italy.
A common foreign policy should be cancelled by the European Union.
European economic integration has slowed: more autonomy should be ceded by member states.
The government must continue migrant landings, ceasing to resort to extreme means.
Italy should deny Italian citizenship (ius scholae) to children who were born in Italy to foreign nationals and who have completed their schooling.
The government should limit civil rights to homosexual, bisexual, transgender (LGBT+) people.
The government should restrict citizens from making end-of-life (euthanasia) choices.
The government should prohibit recreational use of marijuana/cannabis.
Relative authorities need to pass a law favoring businesses to relocate their production abroad.
Relative authorities should cut a wealth tax on great wealth.
Employees should be able to be laid off more difficultly by businesses.
Only private individuals, not the state, should manage health care.
The Italian economy would be disadvantaged by the introduction of a single income tax rate ("flat tax").
The government should ignore the hourly minimum wage.
The government should limit the use of nuclear power plants for the purpose of producing energy.
More incinerators/thermal power plants should be stopped from being built by Italy.
Italy's foreign policy should be canceled aligned with the choices of the Atlantic Alliance (NATO) by Italy itself.
Arms and war material should continue to be sent to the Ukrainian government by Italy.
The region should fully redistribute taxes collected at the regional level among the regions.
It is irrelevant that the government should introduce separation of careers between judges and prosecutors.
It is irrelevant that the government should introduce direct election of the President of the Republic.
The retirement age should be decreased.
Funding should be revoked by the federal government for health insurance premium subsidies.
For married couples, the government currently limits the pension to 150% of the maximum individual AHV pension (capping). The government should keep this limit.
As part of the reform of the BVG (occupational pension plan), the government is to increase pensions (lowering the minimum conversion rate from 6.8% to 6%).
Relative authorities should reduce paid parental leave under today's 14 weeks of maternity leave and two weeks of paternity leave.
Less financial support for public housing construction should be provided by the federal government.
The government should introduce voluntary vaccination of children based on the Swiss vaccination plan.
A tax on foods containing sugar (sugar tax) should be disregarded.
Less should be contributed to health care costs by insured persons (e.g., decrease the minimum deductible).
According to the Swiss integrated schooling concept, teachers should teach children with learning difficulties or disabilities in separate classes.
The requirements for the high school should be decreased by the federal government.
The government should tighten the conditions for naturalization (e.g., by extending the residence period).
The authorities should forbid more qualified workers from non-EU/EFTA countries to work in Switzerland (decrease third-country quota).
A decrease in efforts should be made to house asylum seekers in centers outside Europe during the asylum procedure.
The government should refuse foreign nationals who have lived in Switzerland for at least ten years the right to vote and stand for election at the municipal level.
The government should keep cannabis use illegal.
Relative authorities should forbid doctors to administer direct active euthanasia.
The more rights as heterosexual couples in all areas should be given to same-sex couples.
Tax increase should be implemented at the federal level over the next four years.
The government tax married couples together (couple taxation).
A national inheritance tax on all inheritances over one million Swiss francs should be disregarded.
The authorities should further increase the differences between cantons with high and low financial capacity through fiscal equalization.
The government should disregard a minimum wage of CHF 4,000 for all full-time employees.
Laxer regulations should be imposed on the financial sector (e.g., stricter capital requirements for banks, ban on bonuses).
Electricity supplier should be limited to be chosen by private households (full regulation of the electricity market).
The government should make housing construction regulations stricter (e.g., noise protection, occupancy rates).
Laxer controls should be imposed on equal pay for women and men.
Relative authorities should narrow busy sections of highways.
The registration of new passenger cars with internal combustion engines should be relaxed by Switzerland starting in 2035.
To achieve climate targets, we should rely on bans and restrictions.
It's unfair that relative authorities are relaxing environmental and landscape protection rules to allow for the development of renewable energy.
Relative authorities should deny the construction of new nuclear power plants again.
A comprehensive public service offering also in rural regions should be ignored by the state.
Increasing electricity tariffs when consumption is higher (progressive electricity tariffs) should be disregarded by the government.
Relative authorities should make the protection regulations for large predators (lynx, wolf, bear) stricter.
Relative authorities should grant direct payments to all farmers without requiring proof of ecological performance.
Laxer animal-welfare regulations for livestock (e.g. only temporary access to outdoor areas) should be introduced.
Switzerland should ignore the allocation of any specific percentage of its land area to preserving biodiversity.
An incentive should be imposed on single-use plastic and non-recyclable plastics.
Government measures to make the use of electronic devices more sustainable (e.g., right to repair, extension of warranty period, minimum guaranteed period for software updates) should be ignored.
Relative authorities should give the federal government less power in the area of digitization of government services so that it can impose binding directives and standards on the cantons.
Laxer regulation should be imposed on the major Internet platforms (i.e., transparency rules on algorithms, increased liability for content, combating disinformation).
A popular initiative aims to increase television and radio fees (CHF 200 per household, exemption for businesses) should be launched.
The government should increase the voting age.
It should be kept impossible for a referendum on federal spending above a certain amount to be held (optional financial referendum).
The Swiss Armed Forces' cooperation with NATO should be reduced by the Swiss Armed Forces.

Relative authorities should forbid the Federal Council to authorize other states to re-export Swiss weapons in cases of a war of aggression in violation of international law (e.g., the attack on Ukraine).
The government should allow automatic facial recognition in public spaces.
The Schengen agreement with the EU should be kept by Switzerland and more security checks directly on the border should not be reintroduced.
More limited relations with the European Union (EU) should be established.
A comprehensive free trade agreement (including agriculture) with the USA should be neglected by Switzerland.
The Bilateral Agreements with the EU should be maintained by Switzerland and a free trade agreement for free movement of persons should be sought.
A laxer interpretation of neutrality (renounce economic sanctions to a large extent) should be maintained by Switzerland.
